title: neottopteris pachyphylla
intro: Neottopteris pachyphylla, also known as the leathery fern, is a species of flowering plant in the family Dryopteridaceae, native to tropical Asia. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat various health conditions, including fever, cough, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Neottopteris pachyphylla include its anti-inflammatory and antiviral properties, which may help to reduce swelling and alleviate symptoms associated with infections. In terms of herbal preparations, Neottopteris pachyphylla is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety as a medicinal treatment.
